content.text: Across chat, API, and coding tools, Claude supports a broad capability set:
: conversations, Q&A, summarization, translation, rewriting, style transfer, classification, and structured data extraction.
: solving multi‑step problems in math, logic, legal/financial analysis, scientific reasoning, planning, and decision support.

: generating, explaining, refactoring, and testing code across many languages; Claude Code can operate directly on your filesystem, understand architecture, and manage multi‑file changes and CI/CD workflows.

: interpreting charts, graphs, diagrams, screenshots, photos; extracting text from imperfect images; combining visual and textual reasoning (e.g., “interpret this architecture diagram and suggest improvements”).
: reading long PDFs, codebases, or knowledge bases and answering questions with high recall, aided by large context windows and strong long‑context benchmarks like “Needle in a Haystack.”

: some Claude interfaces support an “extended thinking” mode where the model is allowed to internally reason step‑by‑step and allocate more compute to hard problems before giving the final answer, improving quality on complex tasks.
: via the Messages API, Claude can call tools (like your own APIs, databases, code interpreters), perform web search, and emit structured outputs (e.g., JSON/XML) to plug into downstream systems.
